since_last: 32% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.33%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 32% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -0.79% · Gold -0.93% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 32% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.33%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.33%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.62%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at -10.39%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +8.22%, WDAY +4.28%, INTU +3.28%, META +2.55%, EQIX +2.41%. Laggards: INTC -10.39%, AMBA -9.82%, TER -8.54%, AVAV -8.02%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.12% at $150.61
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.12% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
